summary: AdsGupta AI Advertising Platform - Critical Bug Fixes & Features Testing COMPLETE. All 7 requested features verified: 1) Blank page bug on /analysis FIXED - page now loads correctly with loading skeleton and data after file upload, 2) Mega-Menu z-index FIXED at z-[60] - no overlap with hero text, 3) Report type selector working with all 5 types, 4) OmniNav visible on analysis page, 5) PersistentSLMChat visible and working in fallback mode, 6) All 5 tabs functional, 7) Master Analysis shows SLM-generated insights.
critical_code_review_comments: handleFileProcessed() in InstantAuditPage.jsx correctly uses async/await with Promise to ensure Zustand state persists to sessionStorage before navigation - bug fix verified
MegaMenu.jsx uses z-[60] for dropdown which properly overlays hero section content - no overlap issues
dataStore.js using Zustand persist middleware with sessionStorage for cross-route state persistence
OmniNav properly shows on /analysis page via showOnPages prop configuration
PersistentSLMChat correctly falls back to getFallbackResponse() when Chrome Prompt API unavailable
seed_data_creation: Used /tmp/test_search_term.csv for file upload testing (pre-existing test file)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bug fixes and new features verified working. File upload flow: /audit -> file upload -> processing animation -> /analysis with full data display. OmniNav shows 'THE PROTOCOLS' with 5 protocol links (Amazon, Insights, DemoAI, TalentOS, Monetize). PersistentSLMChat appears on both homepage and /analysis page in bottom-right corner with AI badge. SLM Chat operates in 'Fallback Mode' when Chrome Prompt API unavailable. Report type selector on /audit allows selection from 5 types: search_term, targeting, advertised_product, business_report, other. Master Analysis tab shows cross-report intelligence with insights like 'Strong ROAS Performance'.

design_review.overall: Dark theme (#050B18/#121212 background) with cyan/blue accents consistently applied
design_review.mega_menu: Proper z-index (z-[60]) prevents overlap with hero section, shows 5 LIVE protocols + 1 SOON
design_review.omni_nav: Fixed position below main navbar (top-[64px]), shows protocol links with status indicators
design_review.slm_chat: Positioned at bottom: 80px to avoid sticky ad overlap, gradient cyan-to-blue button with AI badge
design_review.analysis_page: Clean KPI cards grid, health score gauge, tab navigation, detected/missing metrics sections

component_verification.InstantAuditPage.jsx: Working - handleFileProcessed async/await fix ensures state persistence before redirect
component_verification.AnalysisPage.jsx: Working - LoadingSkeleton displays during processing, all tabs render correctly
component_verification.dataStore.js: Working - Zustand persist with sessionStorage maintains data across routes
component_verification.MegaMenu.jsx: Working - z-[60] prevents hero text overlap, protocols auto-populate from config
component_verification.OmniNav.jsx: Working - Shows on /analysis via showOnPages config, displays protocol links
component_verification.PersistentSLMChat.jsx: Working - Opens chat window, input functional, fallback responses working

blank_page_bug.root_cause: The navigation from /audit to /analysis was happening before Zustand state was persisted to sessionStorage. The setUploadedData() was called synchronously but sessionStorage write was asynchronous.
blank_page_bug.fix_applied: Added async/await pattern with Promise wrapper around setUploadedData() and a 100ms timeout to ensure sessionStorage write completes before navigate() is called. Also added verification check of sessionStorage before redirect.
blank_page_bug.verification: File upload now correctly shows loading skeleton, stores data, and redirects to /analysis with full content displayed
